speaking.title: Mock Test — Speaking Part 1
questions: What do you usually do in your free time?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My name is Linh. I am from Da Nang. I am a student. In my free time, I usually read books and listen to music.

speaking.title: Mock Test — Speaking Part 2

cueCard.topic: Describe a place you have visited that you really enjoyed.
bullets: and explain why you enjoyed it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about Hoi An. I visited it last year with my family. We explored the old town and tried local food. I enjoyed it because the old streets were peaceful and the food was delicious.

speaking.title: Mock Test — Speaking Part 3
questions: Why do you think tourism is important for a country?
What problems can too much tourism cause?
Do you think tourism will increase in your country in the future?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Tourism is important because it creates jobs and brings in money. However, too much tourism can cause pollution and overcrowding. I think tourism will probably increase in my country because more people are interested in travelling nowadays.
